title: Step S-SWQT-0010: Registry 集成与 /packages 页

items.statement: 实现 registry 只读客户端与 /packages 页，匿名展示 @swui/ui 与 @swui/ui-tokens 版本、peer 与 install 指引，含 stale 降级。

inScope: server/registry-client.ts（或 portal 内等价模块）：GET npm.inet.swqt.net/@swui%2fui 等。
15min TTL 内存/文件缓存；失败返回 stale + cachedAt。
/packages 页面：dist-tags.latest、版本列表、peerDependencies、npm/bun install 命令、.npmrc 模板。
无 tarball 下载按钮；dist.tarball 不在 UI 暴露。

items.researchEvidence: R-SWUI-002 §8 Registry 集成方案 A；§13 registry metadata 匿名可读。

externalDependencies: npm.inet.swqt.net 网络可达（CI 可 skip-with-reason 若不可达）

items.problemDefinition: 版本与 peer 信息仅在 registry，开发者需手动 npm view 或查 publish 记录。
items.requirementsDefinition: packages 页展示两包 latest 与 install 片段；registry 宕机时显示 stale 横幅。
items.plainLanguage: 安装前在浏览器一眼看到装什么版本、怎么配 .npmrc。
items.firstSlice: registry-client 单元测试或脚本 smoke 返回 @swui/ui dist-tags。

readiness.reason: registry metadata 匿名可读已确认；依赖 S-SWQT-0009 portal 可 build。

items.summary: Implemented registry-client with TTL cache and stale fallback, /packages UI, registry API handlers, and REGISTRY_FIXTURE fixtures for CI.
items.result: Packages page shows @swui/ui and @swui/ui-tokens metadata; stale banner on fetch failure; no tarball URLs exposed.

cases.name: Developer checks install guidance before npm install
cases.evidence: /packages shows latest dist-tags, peerDependencies, and .npmrc template.

gateOutcomes.evidence: Read-only metadata only; anonymous registry read; install hints without tarball mirror.
registry-client unit tests cover cache TTL, stale, fixtures; Playwright covers /packages UI.
REGISTRY_FIXTURE=1 enables deterministic CI without live registry.

items.residualRisk: Live registry unreachable in CI mitigated by fixtures; production requires npm.inet.swqt.net.

items.validationSummary: registry-client unit tests pass; /packages Playwright cases pass with REGISTRY_FIXTURE
items.rootMount: Yes - layout v3 stable Step path; no physical archive move.
items.hardPromotionGateSummary: minimum auto-filled by workflow promote; validationSummary provided.
items.testCaseSummary: registry-client unit tests pass; /packages Playwright cases pass with REGISTRY_FIXTURE
